suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on when to use direct field mutation vs method-based updates on AppConnectionProgressSnapshot. Currently, step changes use update_step() but detection results use direct field assignment (progress.detected_agents = ...). A convention would help future workers stay consistent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature detection-in-guided-ssh-connect uses direct field mutation for detected_agents and pending_agent_selection on AppConnectionProgressSnapshot, while other state changes in the same function use update_step(). No convention is documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a note about DRY cleanup patterns in connect_remote_over_ssh_with_agent_type(). The disconnect+health-update+progress-reset pattern is repeated 3 times in the same function. A helper method could reduce repetition and risk of drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature detection-in-provider-ssh-connect: three nearly identical error-cleanup blocks in connect_remote_over_ssh_with_agent_type() at lines ~795-801, ~813-819, and ~841-847 of mobile_client/mod.rs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider relaxing or clarifying the 'Write Tests First (Red)' step in the rust-backend-worker skill. Two of three workers in this milestone wrote tests after implementation rather than before. The skill feedback claimed followedProcedure: true despite the deviation. Either enforce TDD strictly or acknowledge iterative test-after as acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features detection-in-guided-ssh-connect and detection-in-provider-ssh-connect both had implementation edits before test edits in their transcripts. The skill Step 2 says 'Before ANY implementation: Create test cases'.

rejectedObservations.observation: The command -v <binary> pattern for probing remote binary availability should be documented in .factory/library/
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — provider-transport.md already covers this pattern extensively (lines 293, 407, 409)
